items.title: Solid first 5 minutes from the Sparks today, as they lead the WNBA’s best team, the Lynx, by a 13-4 score. Sparks have started 6-for-10 from the field while the Lynx have missed all 7 of their 3-point tries. Nneka Ogwumike has 6 points.

items.title: Sydney Taylor is a bucket and a problem. She has ridiculous burst as a driver and can hit layups with either hand from any angle. Pretty great story for a player who started the year on a training camp contract. One of the lone bright spots in another lost Sky season.

items.title: NEW STORY: It's Neemias Queta's 5th time at Summer League.
items.author: Noa Dalzell
items.body_excerpt:
NEW STORY: It's Neemias Queta's 5th time at Summer League. 

The first 4 times, he was a player fighting to keep his NBA dreams alive.

This time, he showed up on the heels of a big-time extension. 

“I've been wishing for something like that to happen."
www.celticsblog.com/boston-celti...

media.title: Neemias Queta experienced a full-circle moment at Summer League
media.description: Queta returned to NBA Summer League for the fifth time this summer — but this time, as the manifestation of a dream come true.

items.title: On its face it doesn’t sound good but it seems like the clean energy fund is extremely healthy. Using $75 million from a fund currently worth $1.7 billion and makes $200 million/year doesn’t seem like the most egregious use of $$$, especially if it’s put towards building the aren
items.author: Erik García Gundersen
items.body_excerpt: On its face it doesn’t sound good but it seems like the clean energy fund is extremely healthy. Using $75 million from a fund currently worth $1.7 billion and makes $200 million/year doesn’t seem like the most egregious use of $$$, especially if it’s put towards building the arena more sustainably.
